About Us

Guiding You Through Ancient Wisdom

AstroVedic was founded in 1999 with a singular mission: to bring the profound wisdom of Vedic astrology to people seeking clarity, direction, and deeper understanding of their life's journey.

Our team of certified Vedic astrologers combines traditional knowledge passed down through generations with modern interpretive techniques, ensuring accurate, relevant, and actionable guidance.

  • Expert Vedic Astrologers with 20+ Years Experience
  • Personalized Birth Chart Analysis
  • Accurate Predictions & Life Guidance
  • Confidential & Trusted Consultations
Book Consultation Call Us Now
Our Values

What We Stand For

Our core values guide every consultation and interaction we have with our clients.

Authenticity

We practice only authentic Vedic astrology methods passed down through ancient lineages.

Excellence

Our astrologers are highly trained and continuously update their knowledge.

Client Focus

Every consultation is personalized to address your unique life situation and goals.

Integrity

We believe in honest, transparent readings without fear-based predictions.

Our Journey

Our Milestones

From a humble beginning to becoming a trusted name in Vedic astrology.

1999

Founded AstroVedic

Started with a small team of 3 dedicated astrologers.

2005

Online Expansion

Launched digital consultations reaching clients worldwide.

2012

1000 Happy Clients

Milestone of 1,000 satisfied clients and counting.

2020

Award Recognition

Received Best Astrology Platform award nationally.

2024

5000+ Clients

Serving over 5,000 clients across 30+ countries.
